task-1778260401811-4jz029.description: D-1: Backend livekit_publisher.py — wrapper LocalAudioTrack LiveKit. Expose publish_pcm(pcm, sample_rate=22050) + unpublish() pour barge-in. TDD obligatoire avec mock Room. Spec ref: docs/specs/2026-05-08-voice-body-pipeline-design.md §3.1 + §6.1.

task-1778260404164-bqnzmx.description: D-3: Backend WS /viewer/events + JWT auth + endpoint refresh. Auth via auth/dependencies.py existant. Token claim session_id signé. Rate limit 1 conn/token, 5/user. TDD avec FastAPI TestClient + WS test client. Spec ref: §3.1 + §4.1 + §6.1 + §6.3.

task-1778260407187-q9hn09.description: D-6: Frontend LiveKitProvider + audio consumer + lipSync attach. Wrapper @livekit/client Room lifecycle. Context React. Au mount: connect via /voice/token, attach audio track au lipSync.attachMediaElement, gérer AudioContext autoplay policy. TDD Vitest + mocks LiveKit Room. Spec ref: §3.2 + §6.2.
